title: Iron Bark
text: The roots harden into armour. Dungeon Score +1.
lose: The Curse drawn cannot be ignored.

title: Cracked Pillars
text: The old pillars fracture under their own weight. Dungeon Score -1.
win: Claim Grounded Earth and gain +1 on your next Dungeon battle.

title: Buried Oath
text: A stone vow demands discipline. No score change.
win: Gain 1 Mastery if you committed exactly 2 troops.

title: Mountain Heart
text: The living mountain wakes beneath you. Dungeon Score +2.
win: Gain 1 Mastery as well as Grounded Earth.
lose: Discard 1 committed troop, draw 1 Curse, and move back 1 space.
